name: Pan-Tilt Wind Disturbance Stiffness Analysis
description: As a robotics engineer, evaluate the stiffness of a 2-DOF pan-tilt camera mechanism (base, yaw joint, intermediate link, pitch joint, and payload) against wind gusts using CoppeliaSim (ZMQ Remote API port 23000). The mechanism must be constructed from geometric primitives and revolute joints, using PID position control targeted at 0.0 radians for both joints. Conduct 4 simulation trials applying lateral forces of 10N, 30N, 50N, and 100N to the payload for 1.0 second each, with a 2.0-second recovery period. Record the transient response to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/disturbance_timeseries.csv (columns: trial_id, sim_time_s, force_applied_N, yaw_error_rad, pitch_error_rad) and save a summary report to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/stiffness_report.json (fields: total_trials, tested_forces_N, peak_yaw_deflections_rad, peak_pitch_deflections_rad, controller_stiff_enough). Login: username=ga, password=password123.
